name: Raspberry Liqueur
recipeInstructions:
1. Select full-colored, plump berries, avoiding stained baskets (sign of overripe or decayed berries). Season is May to July.
2. Do not wash berries until ready to use, as water can cause mold to form.
3. Rinse the selected berries and place them in a mixing bowl, lightly crushing them to release flavor.
4. Add vodka, vanilla bean, and allspice to the bowl. Stir gently.
5. Store the mixture in a bottle in a cool, dark place for 3 weeks.
6. Strain the mixture through dampened cheesecloth or sieve, squeezing out as much juice as possible.
7. Pour the strained liquid back into the bottle, adding sugar syrup to taste (1/3 to 1/2 cup per pint).
8. Age the liqueur another 3-5 weeks before consuming.
Yield: 1 pint plus Container: Wide mouth quart jar
